title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Navi Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services:
Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services!
